channel.title: Azure Virtual Machines on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Virtual Machines on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public preview: Azure Linux 4.0 for Azure Virtual Machines and VM Scale Sets
item.description:
Azure Linux 4.0 is in public preview for Azure Virtual Machines and VM Scale Sets. It introduces a newer platform stack, including Linux kernel 6.18 LTS and the dnf5 package manager.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Snapshot backup for SQL Server in Azure VMs
item.description:
Azure Backup now supports snapshot-based backup for SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines in public preview. It uses Azure disk snapshots with native SQL transaction log backups to provide near-instant, low-impact full backups for large SQL databases.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Bulk Restore for Azure Virtual Machines using Azure Backup
item.description:
Azure Backup adds Bulk Restore for Azure Virtual Machines in public preview. Customers can restore up to 100 VMs in a single operation to simplify large-scale recovery.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Arc adds SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines as a migration target
item.description:
Azure Arc migration now supports SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines as an additional migration target. Arc-enabled SQL Server instances can now be migrated either to Azure SQL Managed Instance or to SQL Server running on Azure infrastructure using the same unified migration flow.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: Retirement: End of lift reminder of HBv2/HC-Series/NP-Series Azure Virtual Machine in Azure Batch Pool
item.description:
Azure Batch will retire support for HBv2-series, HC-series, and NP-series VMs in Batch pools on May 31, 2027. The notice applies to these VM sizes only when used in Azure Batch pools.

  • Source: Azure Updates
